name: codex-plugin-cc
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        openai /

      codex-plugin-cc  

    
      Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
summary: 该项目允许用户通过Claude Code调用OpenAI Codex来审查代码或委派任务，值得关注是因为它打通了不同AI工具之间的协作壁垒，提升了代码审查与任务处理的灵活性和效率。

name: page-agent
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        alibaba /

      page-agent  

    
      JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
summary: 阿里巴巴的 page-agent 是一个用自然语言控制网页界面的 JavaScript 内嵌 GUI 代理工具，值得关注是因为它让用户无需编写代码即可通过简单指令操作网页，极大降低了自动化交互的门槛。

name: Zackriya-Solutions
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Zackriya-Solutions /

      meetily  

    
      Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.
summary: 该项目是一个基于Rust构建的隐私优先AI会议助手，支持4倍速实时转录、说话人分离和本地摘要生成，完全离线运行无需云端服务。值得关注的是它实现了100%本地化处理，在保障数据隐私的同时提供高效会议记录功能，且开源可自托管。

name: asgeirtj
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        asgeirtj /

      system_prompts_leaks  

    
      Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
summary: 该项目提取并公开了Anthropic、OpenAI、Google、xAI等多家AI模型的系统提示词，并定期更新，值得关注因为它揭示了主流AI产品的底层指令设计。

name: cs249r_book
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        harvard-edge /

      cs249r_book  

    
      Machine Learning Systems
summary: 该项目是哈佛大学《机器学习系统》课程的配套教材，因其由顶尖学府系统化讲解ML系统设计与部署，且代码开源，对学习生产级ML工程极具参考价值。

name: CoplayDev
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        CoplayDev /

      unity-mcp  

    
      Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.
summary: Unity MCP 是一个连接AI助手与Unity编辑器的桥梁，让大语言模型能够管理资源、控制场景、编辑脚本并自动化任务，值得关注因为它能极大提升Unity开发效率。

name: claude-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        alirezarezvani /

      claude-skills  

    
      337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.
summary: 该项目是一个为Claude、Codex、Gemini CLI、Cursor等10余种编程助手提供330+技能和70+自定义命令的插件库，覆盖工程、营销、合规、高管咨询等全领域，因其高度可定制和跨平台兼容性而值得关注。

name: terax-ai
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        crynta /

      terax-ai  

    
      Lightweight (7MB) Terminal-first AI-native dev workspace
summary: Terax-ai 是一个轻量级（7MB）的终端优先 AI 原生开发工作空间，因其极小的体积和终端友好的设计，值得关注。
